title: Adventure's Galore
description: Wandering minecraft can get a bit stale after a while. This mod is designed to add a bit of spice(and lore) to your adventure
body:
Ever feel like wandering minecraft is well, boring? Adventure's Galore tries to fix that by adding various structures. Which add that little bit of spice when exploring to stop it from becoming repetitive. Based around being vanilla friendly

I would recommend pairing this with other exploration mods for the best experience. But this mod also works well stand-alone

The strucures added are as following
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-A jungle observatory high above the jungle floor hidden from those unaware. Spawn's in the jungle (Duh!)

-An old well abandoned and forgotten seemingly by time itself. Spawn's in the spruce forest's

-A destroyed blacksmith, before villages existed villagers would have to fend for themself's some were not as fortunate as others. Spawn's in the plains biome

-An abandoned village house, the people that living in these structures seem to have hastily left... Spawn's in the plains biome

-A normal looking abandoned house that holds a dark secret. Also spawn's in the plains


</details>
